assertions.title: First-visit journey end-to-end

steps.expected: Landing page with hero and CTA
steps.observed: Landing page loaded with Get Started CTA
Navigated to /auth/signup
Account created, redirected to /dashboard
Plan creation page loaded with chat interface

steps.expected: AI generates plan with semester grid
steps.observed: AI responded but plan not saved due to rate limit
Dashboard shows 'No plans yet' - plan auto-save issue

evidence.network: No plan save API calls captured - auto-save may not be implemented or working

assertions.issues: Plan auto-save not working - dashboard shows 'No plans yet' after plan generation. AI rate limiting also prevented full plan generation.

assertions.title: Dashboard lists all user plans

steps.expected: Dashboard shows list of user's plans
steps.observed: Dashboard shows 'No plans yet' empty state

assertions.issues: Cannot verify plan listing because plan auto-save is not functioning. Dashboard consistently shows empty state.

assertions.title: Multiple plans per user

steps.expected: First plan saved and appears on dashboard
steps.observed: Plan generation attempted but not saved

steps.action: Create second plan with different inputs
steps.observed: Could not create first plan due to save issue

assertions.issues: Blocked by plan auto-save issue - cannot create multiple plans to verify this assertion

assertions.title: Plan shows prerequisite information

steps.expected: Semester grid shows courses with prerequisites
steps.observed: No plan was successfully saved/generated

assertions.issues: Cannot verify prerequisite display because plan generation and persistence is not working

assertions.title: New plan route is accessible and functional

steps.expected: Page renders with chat input and plan display area
steps.observed: Page loaded successfully with chat interface
Text input accepts input, send button enables when text entered

assertions.title: Unsupported CC/school/major shows no-data message

steps.action: Request plan for unsupported school (Harvard to MIT)
steps.expected: AI responds with no-data message and suggestions
steps.observed: Rate limit error occurred before AI could respond

assertions.issues: OpenRouter rate limit (20 req/min) prevented testing this assertion. Previous requests exhausted the rate limit.

assertions.title: Auth gate redirect-back on plan creation

steps.observed: User signed out and redirected to /

steps.expected: Redirected to sign-in with redirectTo parameter
steps.observed: Redirected to /auth/signin?redirectTo=%2Fplan%2Fnew
Successfully redirected to /plan/new after sign-in
Chat input visible and functional

assertions.title: Data persistence across sessions

steps.observed: Plan not saved due to auto-save issue
Signed out successfully
Dashboard shows 'No plans yet'

assertions.issues: Cannot verify data persistence because no plan was successfully saved. Auto-save functionality appears to be non-functional.

assertions.title: Multiple plans management

steps.expected: Plan A saved and appears on dashboard
steps.observed: Plan not saved

steps.expected: Plan B saved alongside Plan A
steps.observed: Could not create any plans

steps.expected: Both plans show correct data when clicked
steps.observed: No plans available to verify

assertions.issues: Blocked by plan auto-save issue - cannot create multiple plans to verify management functionality

frictions.description: Plan auto-save feature (VAL-PLAN-003) does not appear to be working. After AI generates a plan, navigating to dashboard shows 'No plans yet' instead of listing the created plan.
OpenRouter rate limiting (20 req/min, 50 req/day) prevents extensive AI testing. Multiple plan generation attempts quickly exhaust the rate limit.

blockers.description: Plan auto-save not functioning - plans generated via AI chat do not persist to the database. Dashboard consistently shows 'No plans yet' empty state even after successful AI plan generation.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified no console errors, checked dashboard multiple times, signed out and back in - no plans persisted

blockers.description: OpenRouter API rate limit reached (20 requests per minute). Cannot test AI-dependent assertions like unsupported school/major handling.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Waited for rate limit to reset, but limit persisted across test session

summary: Tested 9 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-PLAN-009, VAL-CROSS-002), 7 blocked by plan auto-save issue or rate limiting. Core plan persistence functionality appears to be non-functional, blocking most plan-related assertions. Auth flow redirect-back works correctly.
